onboarding.title: Welcome to Sequencing
onboarding.step1: Each round shows two films. Pick the one that draws you in more.
onboarding.step2: The system extracts your viewing preferences across 30 rounds to generate your DNA.
onboarding.step3: Skip when you cannot judge it; swap when you just need a different pair.
confirm.logout: Are you sure you want to sign out?
confirm.leaveGroup: Are you sure you want to leave this theater?
confirm.deleteAccount: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone. All data including your taste DNA and match history will be permanently deleted.
footer.tagline: Trace your taste through the films you choose.
landing.step1Desc: Choose one film that represents your taste as a calibration point.
landing.step2Desc: Follow your instinct with every choice, and your taste will slowly come into view.
landing.step3Desc: AI analyzes your choice patterns to produce a unique archetype and taste profile.
landing.step4Desc: Find people whose cinematic DNA aligns with yours through vector similarity.
landing.step5Desc: Once matched, tear the ticket to reveal your partner and conversation starters.
landing.previewNote: Browse the core inner pages before signing up; interactive actions and the admin area remain locked.
error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: The page encountered an error. Please try reloading.
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
guard.needDna: Please generate your cinematic DNA first
pricing.title: CineSequence Pricing Notes
pricing.lead: This page briefly lists the purchasable sequencing extensions, full retests, and restore-invite-access option, while also keeping a flexible buy-me-a-coffee entry point.
pricing.statusNote: Payments are processed via ECPay; account sign-in is required before purchase.
pricing.extend.title: 10 Additional Rounds
pricing.extend.body: Append 10 more rounds to the current DNA file to tighten the read on your cinematic profile.
pricing.extend.detail1: Unlock 10 additional sequencing rounds on the current run.
pricing.extend.detail2: Keep the current DNA file and reinforce low-confidence dimensions.
pricing.extend.detail3: Return to the DNA and match flow without rebuilding the account.
pricing.extend.meta: Best for deepening an existing result
pricing.retest.title: Fresh 30-Round Retest
pricing.retest.body: Generate a new DNA report while preserving your history and updating the active dossier.
pricing.retest.detail2: Keep prior history while issuing a new active file.
pricing.retest.detail3: Best when your taste has shifted or you want a clean recalibration.
pricing.retest.meta: Best for issuing a new profile file
pricing.invite.title: Restore Invite Access
pricing.invite.body: Reopen the restricted invite channel so you can actively send invites to a match again.
pricing.invite.detail1: Unlock the restricted invite channel for matches.
pricing.invite.detail2: Let you actively send invites again instead of staying in browse-only mode.
pricing.invite.detail3: Takes effect immediately after successful payment.
pricing.invite.meta: Used when match invites are locked
pricing.contactBody: Use the email below for payment and merchant-review communication. This page is the current public listing for the paid services offered on the site.
pricing.paymentBody: The site offers sequencing extensions, full retests, and restore-invite-access as digital services. If you only want to support the project, use the buy-me-a-coffee link and choose any amount yourself.
pricing.supportBody: If you are not buying sequencing features and only want to support CineSequence, use this direct buy-me-a-coffee entry point.
pricing.supportNote: This is an open-amount support link and does not grant extra product entitlements.
dna.extendUnlocks: Unlock 10 additional rounds, reinforce the current DNA read, and continue the active file.
dna.retestHint: If you want a fresh calibration instead of just extending the current result, open a full retest.
dna.retestUnlocks: Unlock a new 30-round mission, preserve history, and refresh the active file.
matches.dailyLimitReached: Daily invite limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
matches.inviteUnlockBody: This reopens the restricted invite channel and takes effect immediately after payment. Use the pricing notes page if you want the full breakdown first.
complete.paymentNote: Both extension and full retest can be entered from here; the pricing notes page holds the full unlock breakdown and support link.
seq.paymentTitle: Paid options stay visible during sequencing
seq.paymentBody: If you want to inspect extension, full retest, or flexible support options before the completion screen, you can open them here.
preview.title: You are browsing in preview mode
preview.body: Inner pages stay visible before sign-up, but sequencing choices, theater actions, and match interactions stay locked until registration.
notification.title: Notifications
notifications.deck: A log of detected cinematic signals. Matches, invites, DNA decoding — all activity converges here.
auth.subtitle: Decode your cinematic DNA through movie choices
auth.checkEmailSent: We sent a login link to {{email}}
auth.magicLinkHelp: If you do not see the email, check spam first. In local development without an email provider configured, the magic link is written only to the backend logs.
auth.accountNotFound: Account not found. Please register first.
auth.registerHint: This email does not have an account yet. Register first before requesting a login link.
auth.devHint: Use the local admin shortcut and go straight to the dashboard.
auth.layoutCopy: Once your film dossier exists, sequencing, matching, and invites can begin.
auth.layoutRuleBody: There is no in-app messaging. Email addresses are revealed only after an invite is accepted.
auth.layoutGateBody: After registration, you will choose a seed film before entering the full quadrant scan.
auth.modalCopy: Enter the login chamber directly from the home page without breaking your sequencing flow.
auth.modalRuleBody: Once signed in, you can go straight back to sequencing, DNA, and matches.
auth.modalNoAccountPrefix: Need a new account? Go directly to the
register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start your Cine Sequence
register.name: Display name
pref.title: Match preferences
pref.pureTasteHint: Ignore gender and age, match purely on taste
seq.rerollHint: Use this when you want a different comparison, not to signal dislike.
seq.skipHint: Use this when you cannot judge either movie in this round.
seq.moreOptionsHint: Open less common actions without crowding the main flow.
seq.dislikeBothHint: Use this when you can judge both movies and reject both of them.
seq.resumeBody: You already completed part of this sequence. You will jump back in at phase {{phase}} with about {{remaining}} rounds left.
seq.pickMode.body: Have you already seen this one, or is it just calling to you right now?
seqInfo.title: How Sequencing Works
seqInfo.overviewBody: The system extracts multi-layered taste signals from 30 rounds of binary movie choices, converging into your unique cinematic DNA.
seqInfo.phase1Desc: Rule-based pairs calibrate your position across 12 taste axes.
seqInfo.phase2Desc: AI generates adaptive pairs based on your choices, exploring untested taste dimensions.
seqInfo.phase3Desc: Focuses on deep preferences, verifies contradictory signals, and retests low-confidence dimensions.
seqInfo.signal1Desc: Your chosen movie directly strengthens the taste tag being tested in that round.
seqInfo.signal2Desc: All tags on your chosen movie get a subtle positive boost; the rejected movie's tags get a subtle negative nudge.
seqInfo.signal3Desc: Skipping both movies signals low affinity for that dimension — recorded as a weak negative.
seqInfo.resultBody: All signals are processed through log-dampening, confidence weighting, and consistency checks to produce a 30-dimensional taste vector, 12-axis quadrant map, genre profile, and your matched archetype.
seed.title: Choose your starting point
seed.subtitle: Pick a movie that represents your taste to calibrate the first few rounds.
seed.emptyHint: Try the English title, release year, or a shorter name.
complete.title: Sequencing Complete
complete.subtitle: {{total}} rounds of sequence analysis completed. Cinematic DNA is ready.
complete.extendHint: Add 3 rounds for higher precision. {{remaining}} extensions remaining.
complete.maxReached: Maximum extensions reached. DNA analysis is already at full precision.
dna.title: Cine DNA
dna.deck: A dossier of your cinematic instinct, rendered as vectors, symbols, and narrative bias.
dna.enterTheatersHint: Go straight into your primary theater and the other mapped rooms to read their lists, overlap, and room tone.
dna.findMatchesHint: If you want to return to one-to-one resonance first, move into the matching layer from here.
dna.extendHint: If you want the result to hold a little more firmly, add a few more rounds before you move on.
dna.nextStepTitle: Move the result into a real viewing context.
dna.nextStepBody: Your DNA is no longer just analysis copy. The next step is to place it inside rooms, lists, and people, then see which connections actually hold.
matches.title: Matches
matches.emptyHint: Click "Find matches" to discover people with similar cinematic taste
matches.pureTasteHint: Ignore gender and age, match by taste similarity only
matches.deck: Preference filters, invitation state, and chemistry signals arranged as a casting dossier.
ticket.title: Match Ticket
ticket.percentileAbove: Higher than {{percentile}}% of your current candidate pool
theaters.title: Theaters
theaters.nextStep: Your DNA has finished mapping the room layer.
theaters.assignmentReady: Read the primary theater first, then decide which other rooms deserve your attention.
theaters.deck: This is not just a recommendation index. It is the entry point for shared watching, list-making, and room-level curation.
theaters.emptyHint: Run Remap Rooms to refresh your current room assignment from your latest DNA profile.
theaters.fitHint: These are the strongest tags connecting your taste to this room.
theaters.featuredHint: Start with the titles that define the room most clearly.
theaters.libraryHint: Keep the other rooms in view, but do not try to read everything at once.
theaters.cardHintMember: You are already inside this room
theaters.cardHintVisitor: Read the room first, then decide whether to join
theaters.noSharedTags: You qualify for this room, but no single tag is dominating your overlap yet.
theaters.watchlistHint: Ranked by current member overlap, these are the films this room is most likely to rally around.
theaters.activityHint: New lists and replies surface here first.
theaters.userListsEmpty: No one has created a list for this room yet.
theaters.listDescriptionPlaceholder: Add one line explaining what this list is trying to do.
theaters.listItemsPlaceholder: Add one movie title per line to seed this list
theaters.listItemPlaceholder: Add one more title to this room list
theaters.listRepliesEmpty: No one has responded to this list yet.
theaters.messagesHint: Trade one short note about what this room should watch next.
theaters.messagesEmpty: No one has opened the thread yet.
theaters.messagePlaceholder: Drop a short note about what this theater should watch next, or your first read on the room.
admin.title: Admin Dashboard
demo.breaker1: You both gravitate toward twist-driven storytelling.
demo.breaker2: Try watching Dark together for a strong time-travel and existential hit.
demo.breaker3: Both of you lean toward mind-bending narratives that question reality.
payment.context.extend.title: Request Sequencing Clearance
payment.context.extend.description: Declassify 10 additional rounds to go deeper into your cinematic profile.
payment.context.retest.title: Request Full Re-Sequence
payment.context.retest.description: Declassify a clean 30-round readout and refresh your dossier.
payment.context.invite.title: Request Channel Clearance
payment.context.invite.description: Restore contact privileges and reopen invite channels.
payment.context.shareCard.title: Request Clean Share Export
payment.context.shareCard.description: Declassify a premium DNA card built for external circulation.
payment.product.extension.name: CLEARANCE LEVEL: EXTENSION +10
payment.product.bundle.name: CLEARANCE LEVEL: DOSSIER BUNDLE
payment.product.bundle.detail: Declassify 1 full re-sequence plus 2 extension clearances.
payment.product.retest.name: CLEARANCE LEVEL: FULL RE-SEQUENCE
payment.product.inviteUnlock.name: CLEARANCE LEVEL: OPEN CHANNELS
payment.product.inviteUnlock.detail: Declassify unlimited invite access with no expiry.
payment.product.shareCard.name: CLEARANCE LEVEL: CLEAN SHARE CARD
payment.product.shareCard.detail: Declassify a high-resolution DNA export for sharing.
payment.note: Secure clearance processed via ECPay. Declassified credits are non-refundable.
paymentReturn.pendingHint: Usually takes a few seconds. Stand by.
profile.title: Profile
profile.avatarHint: Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP up to 2 MB.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Write a few lines about how you watch films or how you want to be understood.
profile.bioEmptyDisplay: Record pending / no introduction on file
profile.name: NAME
profile.deck: Identity, preference, and sequencing state arranged like a clean production dossier.
profile.identityNotesDeck: Identity, voice, and the details that give this profile a recognizable point of view.
profile.matchingNotesDeck: Preferences and sequencing cues, arranged as concise side notes instead of utility widgets.
profile.preferencesEditorIntro: Adjust the matching brief while keeping the profile readout calm and editorial.
profile.preferencesSummaryIntro: Read as the matching brief: who feels aligned, what age range stays in frame, and how much taste leads the final cut.
profile.pureTasteOnCopy: Taste-first mode is active, so demographic filters stay secondary to the profile signal.
profile.pureTasteOffCopy: Preference filters stay in play before a match is surfaced.
profile.matchThresholdHint: How closely two taste profiles need to align before a match is considered. Higher means fewer but sharper results.
profile.sequencingIntro: Sequencing stays as the profile backbone: current status first, then the archetype that the watch history resolves into.
profile.favoritesHint: Pick up to 3 films that define you for the public dossier.
profile.favoritesEmpty: Curation pending / no must-watch films on file
profile.retestHint: Start a new sequence analysis. History is preserved.
cookie.message: This site uses essential cookies for authentication. By continuing to use this site, you agree to our cookie usage.
dna.mirrorDeck: Three characters whose psychological structure resonates with your taste vector.
dna.disclaimer: The DNA analysis and personality reading are generated by AI for entertainment and self-reflection purposes. They do not constitute professional psychological assessments.
matches.algorithmScore: Compatibility is calculated from 70% tag-vector cosine similarity and 30% quadrant proximity. Only candidates scoring above 85 enter your pool.
matches.algorithmFilter: You can refine candidates with gender, age, and pure-taste filters. The system also performs a bidirectional preference check.
matches.algorithmPercentile: Percentile rank shows where a match stands among all your candidates — higher means more significant taste overlap.
messageBoard.title: COMM CHANNEL
messageBoard.empty: Start a conversation about your shared taste.
inbox.title: MESSAGES
matches.disclaimer: Matches are based on cinematic taste similarity analysis. Compatibility scores reflect shared movie preferences only and do not guarantee interpersonal compatibility.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.serviceBody: Cine Sequence uses movie preference analysis to create taste profiles and suggest compatible connections, helping users discover shared cinematic sensibilities.
terms.eligibilityBody: You must be at least 18 years of age to use this service. By registering, you agree to these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy.
terms.accountBody: You are fully responsible for all activity under your account. Each person may hold only one account, which may not be transferred or shared.
terms.aiBody: DNA readings and personality analysis are generated by AI for entertainment and self-reflection purposes. They do not constitute professional psychological assessments or advice of any kind.
terms.matchingBody: Matches are based solely on cinematic taste similarity. Compatibility scores reflect shared movie preferences only and do not guarantee personal compatibility or any specific relationship outcome.
terms.conductBody: You may not harass or impersonate other users, or misuse the matching system in any manner.
terms.dataBody: For details on how we collect, use, and protect your personal data, please refer to our Privacy Policy.
terms.terminationBody: Accounts found to be in violation of these terms may be suspended or terminated. Users may delete their account at any time through account settings.
terms.warrantyBody: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We make no guarantees regarding match quality or the accuracy of AI-generated analysis.
terms.contactBody: For questions regarding these Terms of Service, please use the contact methods listed on the home page.
register.agreePrefix: I have read and agree to the
register.consentRequired: You must agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
register.ageMinimum: You must be at least 18 years old to use this service
register.scrollToRead: Please scroll to read the full policy
register.disclaimer: This service is available only to users aged 18 and above. The site does not provide direct in-app contact. Email addresses are only revealed when the other person accepts your invite, or when you accept theirs. By registering, you agree to the Terms of Service, the Privacy Policy, and this contact disclosure rule.
register.policySummaryLine1: Before registering: there is no in-app DM system. Email addresses are revealed only after an invite is accepted.
register.policySummaryLine2: We use your basic profile and viewing preferences to generate cinematic DNA, matches, and recommendation outputs.
register.headline: Build your cinematic dossier.
register.copy: Fill in your profile, then we will send a verification email. Once confirmed, you can start the 30-round sequencing.
register.ruleBody: After registration, complete the 30-round sequencing. The system generates your Movie DNA and begins matching.
register.gateBody: If you already have an account, you can
landing.waitlistBody: We are developing new features and performing maintenance, so sign-up is temporarily routed to the waitlist.
waitlist.closedBody: We are developing new features and performing maintenance, so account creation is currently unavailable.
waitlist.closedNotify: Once the system reopens, we will send another email notification.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.collectIntro: To provide our service, we collect:
privacy.collectPicks: Sequencing choices (to compute your taste DNA)
privacy.sharedIntro: When matched with someone, they can see:
privacy.sharedEmailAfterAccept: Email addresses are revealed to both sides only after you accept an invite or the other person accepts yours
privacy.notSharedIntro: Before a match is mutually accepted, the following is not revealed to the other person:
privacy.notSharedEmail: Email address (shared only after both sides are connected through an accepted invite)
privacy.storageBody: Your data is stored in the databases and file storage systems used to operate the service for account, sequencing, matching, and related features. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.thirdPartyBody: We use TMDB for movie data and Google Gemini for some AI-generated analysis. In those flows, third-party services may receive movie queries, title context, or derived preference signals; under the current implementation, we do not intentionally send account identifiers such as your email address or display name.
privacy.rightsBody: You may request to export or delete your account and all associated data at any time.
privacy.contactBody: For privacy-related questions, please use the contact methods listed on the home page.
